commands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'cat .agents/skills/graphify/SKILL.md && cat .agents/skills/graphify-query-planner/SKILL.md && cat .agents/skills/code-review-graph/SKILL.md'

/bin/bash -lc "test -f graphify-out/graph.json && echo graph-present; test -f graphify-out/wiki/index.md && echo wiki-present; rg --files | rg '("'^|/)(ProductController'"\\.cs|ProductModel\\.cs|ProductModelFactory\\.cs|Edit\\.cshtml|Product\\.cs)"'$'"' | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "test -f graphify-out/graph.json && echo graph-present; test -f graphify-out/wiki/index.md && echo wiki-present; rg --files | rg '("'^|/)(ProductController'"\\.cs|ProductModel\\.cs|ProductModelFactory\\.cs|Edit\\.cshtml|Product\\.cs)"'$'"' | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc 'if [ ! -f graphify-out/.graphify_python ]; then GRAPHIFY_BIN=$(command -v graphify 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$GRAPHIFY_BIN" ]; then PYTHON=$(head -1 "$GRAPHIFY_BIN" | tr -d '"'#"'!'"'); case \""'$PYTHON" in *[!a-zA-Z0-9/_.-]*) PYTHON=python3 ;; esac; else PYTHON=python3; fi; mkdir -p graphify-out; "$PYTHON" -c "import sys; open('"'graphify-out/.graphify_python','w').write(sys.executable)\"; fi; graphify query \"ProductController ProductModel ProductModelFactory PrepareProductModelAsync Create Edit InsertProductAsync UpdateProductAsync Nop.Core.Domain.Catalog.Product\" --budget 1800"
